tools.name: list_members
tools.title: List church members
tools.description: List members of the signed-in user's church. Row-level security limits results to what the user is allowed to see. Supports an optional search term (matches first/last name or email) and a limit.

search.description: Optional search term matched against first name, last name, or email.

tools.name: list_events
tools.title: List church events
tools.description: List events for the signed-in user's church. Row-level security limits results. Optionally filter to upcoming events only.

upcoming_only.description: If true, only return events with a start date in the future.

tools.name: list_donations
tools.title: List donations
tools.description: List donations recorded for the signed-in user's church. Row-level security limits results to what the user is allowed to see. Only accessible to roles with finance access (admin, pastor, treasurer).

from_date.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Only donations on or after this date.

to_date.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Only donations on or before this date.
